title: India Government Tenders Scraper
description: Collect Indian government tender leads from GeM and guarded CPPP access.

source.title: Tender Source
source.description: Choose GeM, CPPP, or both. CPPP is skipped without charge when its public listing shows CAPTCHA.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Tender search keywords. Multiple keywords are searched sequentially.

department.title: Department / Ministry
department.description: Optional department or ministry text filter.

state.title: State
state.description: Optional state filter from enriched GeM detail PDFs when available.

minValue.title: Minimum Tender Value (INR)
minValue.description: Optional minimum tender value. Records with unknown value are excluded when this filter is used.

maxValue.title: Maximum Tender Value (INR)
maxValue.description: Optional maximum tender value. Records with unknown value are excluded when this filter is used.

dateFrom.title: Date From
dateFrom.description: Optional published-date filter applied after GeM detail PDF enrichment.

dateTo.title: Date To
dateTo.description: Optional published-date filter applied after GeM detail PDF enrichment.

maxResults.title: Max Results Per Keyword
maxResults.description: Maximum tender records per keyword, up to 500.
